name: Cal-Com
description_short: Cal-Com Federal Credit Union is a member-owned credit union serving Texas Gulf Coast communities since 1968, offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates.
description_long:
Cal-Com Federal Credit Union was founded in 1968 and has been serving the Golden Crescent region of Texas for over 55 years. The credit union operates as a not-for-profit, member-owned financial institution focused on providing personal and business banking services to residents, workers, and those who worship in Lavaca, DeWitt, Jackson, Victoria, Goliad, Calhoun, and Refugio counties. Their mission emphasizes local community connection with the tagline "Your Community Credit Union: Where your hometown and banking go hand in hand."

Cal-Com FCU offers a comprehensive suite of financial products including multiple checking account options (Kasasa Cash, Kasasa Cash Back, Kasasa Tunes, and traditional Share Draft accounts), personal and minor savings accounts, money market accounts, IRAs, and business accounts. On the lending side, they provide auto loans (as low as 6.10% APR), recreational vehicle loans (8.750% APR), boat and motorcycle loans (7.750% APR), personal loans, signature loans, and share-secured loans. They also issue personal credit cards with cash back rewards and offer digital banking services, shared branching, overdraft coverage options, and fraud protection services.

Cal-Com distinguishes itself through branded Kasasa products that offer high dividends and cash back rewards for maintaining local banking relationships. Their rates are competitively positioned for auto and recreational vehicle lending. The credit union emphasizes accessibility, with AudioEye-enabled website optimization and multiple service channels including online banking, shared branching capabilities, and local branch locations. They provide free financial calculators, member resources, and easy account management tools.

As a credit union, Cal-Com operates under NCUA (National Credit Union Administration) insurance rather than FDIC, which provides equivalent deposit protection. However, membership is restricted to those who live, work, or worship in their specific service territory. The organization is undergoing a verification of members' accounts as of December 31, 2025, which members should monitor. While they offer solid competitive rates and member benefits, their geographic service limitation may restrict accessibility for those outside their Gulf Coast Texas communities.
services: Free Kasasa Cash Checking with high dividends
Free Kasasa Cash Back Checking with rewards
Personal Savings and Minor Savings Accounts
Personal Credit Cards with cash back rewards
Digital Banking and Online Account Management
pros: Competitive auto loan rates starting at 6.10% APR with local service
Kasasa Cash Back credit card provides cash back rewards on everyday purchases
Multiple checking account options with high dividend rates (Kasasa Cash, Cash Back, Tunes)
RV, boat, and motorcycle specialty loans with fixed rates (7.75-8.75% APR)
NCUA-insured deposits provide same protection as FDIC-insured banks
Shared branching access extends service beyond local branch locations
Free online banking, financial calculators, and digital fraud protection services
cons: Membership restricted to specific Texas Gulf Coast counties (Lavaca, DeWitt, Jackson, Victoria, Goliad, Calhoun, Refugio) and those who work or worship there
Limited branch locations compared to national banks, though shared branching mitigates this somewhat
Website indicates account verification process underway as of December 31, 2025, requiring member attention to statements
No indication of mobile app or advanced digital-only account opening capabilities mentioned on website
best_for: Texas Gulf Coast residents seeking local community banking with competitive rates
Auto and recreational vehicle buyers in their service territory looking for lower APRs
Small business owners in the Golden Crescent region needing business checking and lending
Members wanting rewards-based checking with cash back and high dividend rates
diagnosis: Cal-Com Federal Credit Union is best for residents and workers in Texas Gulf Coast communities seeking competitive lending rates and member-focused rewards checking. The primary caveat is geographic restriction—membership requires living, working, or worshipping in their specific seven-county service area, making them inaccessible to those outside this region despite their solid product offerings.
typical_results_timeline: Membership approval and account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions are usually faster than traditional banks.
meta_title: Cal-Com — Credit Union in Port Lavaca, TX | CreditDoc
meta_description: Cal-Com — NCUA-insured credit union in Port Lavaca, TX. Member-owned, not-for-profit. Loans, savings, and member services.
